data.title: microservice-based architecture
data.description: Adobe.com utilizes a microservice-based architecture to ensure scalability and manageability of services.
data.technical_spec: Microservices deployed using Kubernetes and Docker for container orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: The site employs a CDN to deliver content quickly and reliably to users around the globe.
data.technical_spec: Uses Akamai for distributing content efficiently.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized API gateway manages request routing for different services.
data.technical_spec: Nginx is used for routing and managing API traffic.

data.title: Cloud-based infrastructure
data.description: Leveraging cloud platforms for better resource management and uptime.
data.technical_spec: Primarily hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS).

data.title: Database Management System
data.description: Robust database management system to handle large volumes of data.
data.technical_spec: Uses a combination of SQL and NoSQL databases, including MySQL and MongoDB.
